subject: Why Mexico must act
body:
America’s border crisis reached another milestone today—and not an encouraging one. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f38e1935f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 5, 2019
---
| | |
# **Why Mexico must act**

**America’s border crisis** reached another milestone today—and not an encouraging one. A few hours ago, U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) released its apprehension figures for last month. There’s only one way to describe the new report.

**“Just stunning,”**[in the words](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e4ac5a20a&e=3ee4985eea) of _The Washington Post’s_ immigration enforcement reporter.

**144,278.** That’s how many immigrants were apprehended or deemed inadmissible at our southern border last month alone. The May figure represents a 32 percent spike from April and makes for the third straight month with at least 100,000 apprehensions or inadmissibles. All told, CBP officials have detained more than 680,000 such migrants this fiscal year alone—more than the entire population of Miami, Florida.

**“We are in a full-blown emergency** , and I cannot say this stronger: The system is broken,” acting CBP Commissioner John Sanders told reporters today.

**The changing face** of illegal immigration demands immediate attention. Families and unaccompanied children make up a growing share of those who circumvent our legal immigration system, which makes an already-severe humanitarian crisis even worse. Last month, 88,676 family unit migrants—including both legitimate families and groups that human smugglers pose as families to game the system—and 11,893 unaccompanied children were apprehended or deemed inadmissible at the border.

**President Donald J. Trump** has repeatedly called on Congress to address the holes in our immigration system that cause this crisis. Just as it has for decades, Capitol Hill ducked. Congressional Democrats have gone so far as to deny that any crisis exists at all.

**Americans deserve the real action** that politicians have promised them for years. Last Thursday, President Trump took it, announcing that the United States would place tariffs on goods from Mexico until our southern neighbor steps up and helps stop the massive number of migrants who violate its laws to illegally access our border.

**More than words are needed**. America has been good to Mexico for many years. All we ask now is that Mexico do its fair share to support our Border Patrol officers and bring law and order to its side of the border, as well. President Trump is confident that Mexico can and will act swiftly to confront this dangerous situation.

[Something to share: Ending a system where the criminals win—and citizens lose. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0986290a4e&e=3ee4985eea)

**By the numbers** : [CBP officers face a worsening crisis at the border.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bacc914251&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump:** [“The migrant crisis is a calamity that must now be solved.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eac4e09c9f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Day 2: The President and First Lady in the U.K.**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1523b299c1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Last night,** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump wrapped up the second day of their official State Visit by hosting members of the Royal Family and other dignitaries at the residence of the U.S. Ambassador to the United Kingdom.

**Some of yesterday’s** most powerful moments came early in the day, when Prime Minister May gave the President and First Lady a pair of special tours. First came an up-close look at a rare copy of the Sussex Declaration, also known as our Declaration of Independence, followed by a visit to the Churchill War Rooms—the famed bunkers used by Winston Churchill and his war cabinet as they strategized for Allied victory during World War II.

[More: President Trump and Prime Minister May lead a business roundtable ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fe437b5a1&e=3ee4985eea)

body:

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190605_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Last month, the U.S. House passed the Equality Act, which prohibits discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. It's a critical piece of legislation that's far overdue in our country. The truth is -- while we here in Minnesota work to lift up and fight for equality for its LGBTQ+ community -- that's not the case everywhere. In many states, someone could be fired from their job, kicked out of a restaurant, or evicted from their apartment because of who they are or who they love. **We cannot remain silent while LGBTQ+ Americans encounter hate, discrimination, and violence. I won 't stop fighting until the Equality Act becomes law.** **[Today, I'm asking you to join me in demanding Mitch McConnell call a Senate vote on the Equality Act. If 5,000 people sign this petition today, we'll be building public pressure on McConnell to take action here -- and you'll be sending a clear message that you won't stand for discrimination.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f0c3/c1f7015/6371ff8c/11473916/2012113840/VEsE/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/lgbtqia-protections/smith/e/")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4f0c3/c1f7015/6371ff8c/11473916/2012113840/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/lgbtqia-protections/smith/e/")** Passing the Equality Act will improve the lives of millions of Americans, and I'm grateful you're in this fight with me. Last weekend, John got on stage at the California Democratic Party Convention and told them a hard truth:

**To defeat Donald Trump and accomplish big progressive goals, socialism is not the answer.**

A lot of people in the crowd didn't want to hear that simple truth, and responded with boos--but John didn't back down. He stood tall and declared "if we're not careful, we're going to help re-elect the worst president in history."

**But sometimes, when you lose the room, you gain a national audience.** News outlets from the _Washington Post_ to _CNN_ to _BuzzFeed_ noted how John shook up the conversation with his remarks, proving that common sense and pragmatism still matter in this race.

**Beating Donald Trump next year will require us to stand up and tell the hard truths, even when they 're not popular. If you agree, will you make your first donation to help John build off this momentum and emerge as a frontrunner in this race?** Look, we can all agree on this: We _need_ a health care system that works for all Americans. We _need_ a bold response to climate change. We _need_ an economy that puts workers and small businesses first. We need to make all of these a reality.

**But embracing socialist policies isn 't the way to get there.**

In Colorado, we got to 95% healthcare coverage, and jumped from 40th in job creation to the #1 economy in the nation. We got there by working with nonprofits and businesses, with Democrats and Republicans, and with progressive policies that worked for everyone.

**That 's what it means to be a _pragmatic_ progressive. And that's the kind of record and resolve it'll take to make Donald Trump a one-term president.**

[**_If you 're ready to help John beat Trump with a message that resonates with the majority of the American people, chip in now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771605/691c9bd/6c3bbc13/11a4e17d/4233278385/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190605_BK_20190605-fr-BK-socialismbump-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If you agree, will you make your first donation to help John build off this momentum | | | "" | "=" Friend, Last weekend, John got on stage at the California Democratic Party Convention and told them a hard truth: To defeat Donald Trump and accomplish big progressive goals, socialism is not the answer. A lot of people in the crowd didn't want to hear that simple truth, and responded with boos--but John didn't back down. He stood tall and declared "if we're not careful, we're going to help re-elect the worst president in history." But sometimes, when you lose the room, you gain a national audience. News outlets from the Washington Post to CNN to BuzzFeed noted how John shook up the conversation with his remarks, proving that common sense and pragmatism still matter in this race. Beating Donald Trump next year will require us to stand up and tell the hard truths, even when they 're not popular. If you agree, will you make your first donation to help John build off this momentum and emerge as a frontrunner in this race? "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" Look, we can all agree on this: We need a health care system that works for all Americans. We need a bold response to climate change. We need an economy that puts workers and small businesses first. We need to make all of these a reality. But embracing socialist policies isn 't the way to get there. In Colorado, we got to 95% healthcare coverage, and jumped from 40th in job creation to the #1 economy in the nation. We got there by working with nonprofits and businesses, with Democrats and Republicans, and with progressive policies that worked for everyone. That 's what it means to be a pragmatic progressive. subject: Protecting our public lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
I know it is a crucial priority to protect our public lands. The Land and Water Conservation Fund is instrumental in protecting our shared heritage of public outdoor spaces for us all. Anyone claiming to represent Montana's interests would go to bat for this program to preserve our public lands for years to come.
My opponent, Steve Daines, falsely claims to support the LWCF, but for the past two years, he's failed to fund the LWCF, even with Republican majorities in Congress, costing us all $1.8 billion dollars in funding for public lands. All the while, he's tried to spin his empty promises as successes.
All funding for the LWCF comes from revenue generated by offshore oil and gas exploration. This money does not come from individuals' taxes.
[**As your next Senator, I 'll fight to fully fund the LWCF and I'll never sell out our values. Donate $5 to send me to D.C. to protect our public lands.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-public-lands?refcode=em190605&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Montana is the most beautiful state in the nation, full of natural treasures and scenic views. From where many us of live, you can hike, bike, fish, and hunt just five minutes away. For me and for most Montanans, protecting our environment comes naturally. It's our way of life.
Montanans deserve a Senator who will stand up for our deeply-held values and defend our environment and public lands, not sell them down the river by voting to not fully fund the LWCF.
[**Contribute $5 now to elect a Senator who will fight to protect our public lands.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-public-lands?refcode=em190605&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-public-lands?refcode=em190605&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Do you remember?
body:
| | Peter, I grew up in a time when Walter Cronkite delivered the evening news on CBS. Over at NBC, there was the team of Chut Huntley and David Brinkley and later, John Chancellor. If you remember those folks, you’re old! I don’t recall ever having a clue what their political leanings were. They kept their personal view to themselves and delivered the news in a way that never signaled the kind of bias that we regularly see with modern news anchors. And while newspapers had editorial content, there was a great big wall between the editorial and the news sections of the papers. Not anymore. And the people at a true disadvantage are us, the American people. [We can no longer rely on the mainstream media to inform the voting electorate, and we especially can’t trust them to help Christian voters. We must reach and equip them ourselves.](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190606apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190606apl01nd&n=1) The First Amendment protects the free press, and it's one of the bedrocks of our freedom because it helps hold the government accountable. It is the closest thing we have to a fourth branch of government. **But with the explosion of social media, that wall separating opinion from factual news has disappeared like a fog on a 100-degree bright sunny day.** We need to remember that Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram are not news sources...they promote opinions. These are all private for-profit companies who are not just there to turn a buck; they are trying to turn minds to the most liberal views of policies and politics possible. The reason why I frequently talk about the bias of the mainstream media is that the public - especially people of faith - need to be on guard. **If biblical principles are going to be advanced in the public square, it will be _despite_ the mainstream media’s reporting - not because of it.** This means the task of equipping Christians with truthful information about the news and elections is up to you and me. I know I don’t have to remind you that the 2020 elections are just around the corner. Yes, we’ll be voting for the next President but we’ll also be voting in the more than 100,000 elections taking place across America! [At My Faith Votes, we are working hard to ensure that all 90-million Christians have faith-based voting resources to help them to cast their ballots and influence culture](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190606apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190606apl01nd&n=2). We cannot rely on the mainstream media, Hollywood, or the culture to tell us what’s important. We have to go to the source of all truth and align our votes with the Word of God. Our national strategy includes partnering with leading Christian voices and running an extensive ground game effort to mobilize Christians to get to the polls in crucial swing districts. [We need your help. I know this is not the first time I’ve asked you, but with each passing week it becomes more evident that unless we provide Christians with biblical voting information, then the mainstream media will provide their own set of facts](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190606apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190606apl01nd&n=3). I’m asking you to please prayerfully consider making a gift to My Faith Votes to help us continue our 2020 strategy to inform and activate Christians. Your donation will help ensure principles of religious freedom, the sanctity of life, and marriage and family are secured for future generations. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190606apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190606apl01nd&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190606apl01nd&n=5)

name: Team Maggie
subject: what happens if we lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc22f/2a380d31/393b1f42/f124ef/2105524517/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc22f/2a380d31/393b1f42/f124ef/2105524517/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
If we want to move a progressive agenda forward, winning back the White House isn't enough. We have to win back control of the Senate too.
**If we end up with a Democratic president but Maggie loses her seat next cycle, the GOP will keep their Senate majority and block any progress a Democratic president could make.**
While presidential candidates jockey for 65,000 donors to get on the debate stage, we've set our own goal: 5,000 gifts in June. [](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb358c/9e00690/6a3a1120/24077193/498034140/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=em-header-logo&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=060619-es-florida-key-pet&source=060619-es-florida-key-pet")

Florida is the key to defeating Donald Trump in 2020. Don't just take it from me, Republican insiders know how important winning Florida is to Trump's re-election prospects and they're scared.

Just the other day, the head of the Republican Party in Florida said "the path to victory is through Florida" and a national Republican Party spokesman said "we have to win Florida... we're going to put all the resources needed into Florida to make that happen."

They know they need to win Florida in 2020, and they're going to pull out all the stops, which means we have to give it all we've got to register and reengage a million new voters - to turn Florida blue and defeat Trump.

**That's my mission and I am committed to putting in the work. I know you will too.**

**[Click here to add your name if I can count on you to stand with me to turn Florida blue and defeat Donald Trump in 2020.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb358c/9e00690/6a3a1120/24077192/498034140/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/commit-to-help-move-us-forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+if+I+can+cou&utm_campaign=060619-es-florida-key-pet&source=060619-es-florida-key-pet")**

This is about more than an election, it's about the character of our country. It's about our future, the future of my children - the future of children across our nation.

I am clear eyed about our goal and who we must upset to reach it and we are not deterred. We will organize in Florida and lay the foundation for a win in this state and for our nation.

We can't allow people to be treated as second-class citizens due to the color of their skin. We must protect a woman's right to have control over her own body. We need to ensure people have access to healthcare and higher education without going bankrupt in the process. We have to pay teachers what they deserve. We have to stop the damage being done to our environment. We need to lift people up, not tear people down and ensure everyone's voice is heard.

**The good news is that no matter what they throw at us, the future is in our hands.**

**[We can turn Florida blue and defeat Trump, but we've got to work together. Can I count you to help move us forward?

](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb358c/9e00690/6a3a1120/24077195/498034140/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/commit-to-help-move-us-forward?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+We+can+turn+Florida+blue+and+defeat+Trum&utm_campaign=060619-es-florida-key-pet&source=060619-es-florida-key-pet")** Together, we can get this done.

Forward.

Andrew Gillum

body:
"The president, who leaned over to embrace one of the World War II veterans who shared the stage at the Normandy American Cemetery..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=688831f459&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘You’re the Pride of Our Nation,’ President Trump Tells Veterans on 75th D-Day Anniversary in Normandy**

“President Donald Trump extolled U.S. veterans gathered in Normandy on the 75th anniversary of D-Day as the ‘pride of our nation’ in a reverential address Thursday,” John Fritze and David Jackson report for _USA Today_.

“The president, who leaned over to embrace one of the World War II veterans who shared the stage at the Normandy American Cemetery and Memorial, heaped praise on the troops who stormed Omaha and other beaches on the French coast, battling through heavy German fire to claim a beachhead and turn the course of World War II.”

“‘We are gathered here on Freedom's Altar,’ Trump said within view of both Omaha beach and the cemetery where 9,388 American military dead are buried.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a11562289c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3b10f1835&e=3ee4985eea), Peggy Grande—Ronald Reagan’s former executive assistant—writes that President Trump struck the right balance between showing respect and projecting strength on his first official State Visit to the United Kingdom. “President Trump and first lady Melania Trump represent all of us when they step on foreign soil . . . Seeing the genuine warmth between President Trump and Queen Elizabeth, the latest state visit was an overwhelming success.”
---
|
---
| “Pennsylvania’s economy has just reached another remarkable milestone — and it didn’t happen by accident,” CNN commentator David Urban writes in [_Morning Call_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=459c1ebfe6&e=3ee4985eea). “The state’s unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8 percent in April — the lowest level since 1976 — and total employment has reached an all-time high of more than 6.2 million . . . There’s no doubt that Pennsylvania’s economy is thriving like never before.”
---
|
---
| “On Wednesday, the Department of Health and Human Services announced it would end the use of human fetal tissue from elective abortions for medical research,” Mary Vought writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0970dc59df&e=3ee4985eea). “For over 25 years, Congress has allowed the National Institutes of Health to dole out what now amounts to more than $100 million each year to researchers who utilize the fetal tissue of aborted babies. There is little to show for this money.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=368ca927d6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a82d912fe&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f838b4a392)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I'm thrilled to welcome you to the team that's going to win back the governor's office.
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b8a/ad6dc73/152f0eac/db4ee77/2959194760/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | Peter,

I'm thrilled to welcome you to the team that's going to win back the governor's office.

My running mate Jacqueline Coleman and I are in this race because under Governor Bevin, Kentucky families are struggling. This governor has tried to rip health care away from hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians, slashed pensions, cut education and repeatedly used his office for personal enrichment. More than ever before, we need to restore the values of honesty, decency, and transparency to the governor's office.

As Kentucky's attorney general, I strive to live up to those values every day. My job is to protect Kentuckians -- and I've done that by going after the opioid manufacturers and distributors that have flooded our communities with pills (while making massive profits), seeking justice for survivors of domestic violence and sexual assault, and safeguarding students and consumers from scammers.

**When Governor Bevin tried to cut our public servants ' pensions, I filed a lawsuit to stop him -- and we won.** When a federal judge decided to overturn the entire Affordable Care Act, threatening the health care of hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians, I took action to fight back.

Kentuckians deserve a commonwealth where they can live, work, and thrive. I am running for governor to fully fund public education, create good paying jobs, and work to provide quality, affordable health care for all Kentuckians.

While our current leaders in Frankfort work to enrich themselves and their friends, Jacqueline and I embraced full transparency by releasing several years of our tax returns.

The general election is in full swing, and I'll keep you informed every step of the way. **Will you follow our campaign on social media for the latest updates?** | | **[Follow us on Facebook](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b8a/ad6dc73/152f0eac/db4ee74/2959194760/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/AndyBeshearKY/")**

Andy

Thanks for chipping in to stand with Bernie.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

subject: waiting for your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
**Tim wants to hear from you. Do you agree with Tim and want to hear more about his vision for healthcare? Let him know below.**

* * *
"Healthcare is a right -- not a privilege. I helped pass the Affordable Care Act (ACA) which allowed millions to be able to afford and receive coverage for the first time in their lives.

But, while the ACA made great strides in expanding access to quality, affordable healthcare, our healthcare system is still broken...

**We need to think big when it comes to making healthcare more accessible and more affordable, which is why I have supported Medicare for All for over a decade. body:
#
Friend,
Today, our parents are celebrating their 28th wedding anniversary. With our dad, Wilmot, out on the campaign trail running for Senate, we wanted to make sure that all of his supporters had the chance to send their best anniversary wishes to him and our mom on this important day.
We're surprising them with an anniversary card--and we need your help to make it special.
**[Sign the card now: Wish our parents, Wilmot and Maddie Collins, a happy anniversary!](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164707/1e3760f0/69a7efdc/5f7eb1db/3570205612/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/happy-anniversary?source=em190606&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**

**[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164707/1e3760f0/69a7efdc/5f7eb1db/3570205612/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/happy-anniversary?source=em190606&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**

Our parents have always led by example. They have both been incredible role models for us for our entire lives. They fled from civil war in Liberia to create a better life--and from pursuing their education to their dedication to public service, that's just what they've done. They instilled in us a guiding principle of serving and giving back to this country that gave us so many opportunities.
This is a big year for our parents. Our mom, Maddie, just earned her doctorate. And as you know, our dad is running to represent the state we love, Montana, in the Senate. We are so proud of them, and thankful for the way they inspire us to be the best versions of ourselves.
**[Can you help us make this an anniversary to remember? Sign the card right now!](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164707/1e3760f0/69a7efdc/5f7eb1db/3570205612/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/happy-anniversary?source=em190606&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Thank you so much,
Bliss and Jaymie Collins
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164707/1e3760f0/69a7efdc/5f7eb1db/3570205612/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/happy-anniversary?source=em190606&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")

body:
Will you help me fight for the truth? | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=bcf63ceab9&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | The Primary Runoff is just over 4 weeks away, and early voting starts in 13 days. Can you believe it? Unfortunately the arrows are coming my way.

With this campaign getting closer to the July 9th Election Day, I've always known this race would heat up. As I said on air yesterday, the TV ad airing against Greg Murphy is not my ad and I have no control over its content. I think it distorts what he said, and I don't endorse it. In the future I will not weigh in on third-party ads against him. Based upon my limited experience in politics, third party attacks are par for the course.

I hope to make a real difference for Eastern North Carolina, and I already have encountered unfair opposition from both Greg's allies and from people with a pro-choice agenda. Anyone planning to get things done has to have thick skin.

I support some of Greg's policies, but we have several key differences, that's why I've launched [MedicaidMurphy.com](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=0e41f99560&e=0bf1d0f47f) to highlight the truth about his efforts to expand government-run healthcare in North Carolina. I oppose it and the new tax he creates to pay for it; he sponsored and led the effort in the House, even though the majority of his Republican colleagues oppose it.

I encourage you and all your friends to base your vote on the issues. Don't take anyone else's word for it. Take a look at the facts here:

---

Peter,

Climate change is real, and here in Kentucky, we need an all-of-the-above energy policy to tackle it. But at the same time, one of the biggest challenges facing Kentucky families is that **energy bills are going up** while good jobs are hard to find and wages remain flat, especially in rural Kentucky.

Families shouldn't have to choose between putting food on the table and paying utility bills, but unfortunately that's a decision too many are being forced to make. That's why **as attorney general, Andy has opposed dozens of utility bill hikes and helped save Kentucky families and businesses nearly $1.2 billion.**

Andy has a record of success preventing utility bill hikes, and **he'll keep working to lower energy bills for our families as governor, including by changing the rules to favor us, not the utility companies**. But if he's going to beat Matt Bevin in November and win this race, he needs to hear directly from Kentuckians on the issue, too.

[**So Peter, will you take Andy's Kentucky Energy Survey and let him know what you think about rising utility bills and what should be done to lower them for our families?**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b8b/ad6dc73/152ae7d2/db4ed43/3685577809/VEsF/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/TDLQLJQ")

Thanks,

## As the Summer begins, Q2 is nearing its end.

Friends,

Summer is finally here, which means you will be seeing our team out marching in parades and reaching out to voters as we ramp up for the 2020 election. During this summer, we will be building our team and preparing for what is shaking up to be the election of our lifetime. If all goes well, we will come out of 2020 with a renewed hope for the future and a new set of leaders ready to take bold action to fight climate change, get money out of politics, and finally fix our broken healthcare system!

I am asking for your support us as we work to bring our audacious vision of hope into reality as we campaign across CD6 this summer. We have just four weeks before the end of the second quarter fundraising deadline to reach our goal, can we count on you to [donate today](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=b98ea05cf8&e=c56804a14d) so that we can bring a progressive voice to Washington?

Thank you so much for your support.

Your friend,

_Ian A. Todd_

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Demand Congress begin impeachment proceedings now. The President is morally and legally compromised.
|
---

| | We've got to focus on two things:

\-- Special Counsel Robert Mueller said his investigation did not exonerate President Trump of criminal wrongdoing.

\-- It's now up to Congress to continue the investigation and hold Trump accountable.

That's why I just called on Congress to begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump.

[**History will not look kindly on those who stay silent right now. Will you sign my petition and demand Congress take action to begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump? I want to hit 1,000 signatures before midnight. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8262b/232dfd1/94a3ea9/62a17e5b/1659502834/VEsH/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/impeachment-survey?source=20190606_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

This is about our commitment to the Constitution, democracy, and the rule of law in the United States.

Robert Mueller's report revealed that Trump may have broken the law and obstructed justice up to 10 times. 10 times! And that's not including any potential campaign finance violations or other crimes.

**The President is morally and legally compromised.**

Members of his own inner circle have been jailed for less than what he may have done. Republicans publicly threatened to impeach President Obama on frivolous grounds, but now cower in front of Trump when evidence of his wrongdoing is publicly available and overwhelming.

A failure to act right now is unacceptable given the facts in front of us. Think of the message it sends to young people. Think of what it means for the future of our democracy...

[**Please add your name and join me in calling on Congress to begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump. We all need to speak up. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8262b/232dfd1/94a3ea9/62a17e5b/1659502834/VEsE/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/impeachment-survey?source=20190606_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

When future generations ask us what we did to uphold the rule of law in the Trump era, we need to say that we did everything we could. The Constitution lays out what we should do when there is ample evidence of high crimes and misdemeanors committed by the President.

**We need to begin impeachment proceedings.**
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION >> **](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8262b/232dfd1/94a3ea9/62a17e5b/1659502834/VEsF/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/impeachment-survey?source=20190606_em_pet_b1_baer_all")
---

Thank you for taking a stand,

Dan

subject: In Normandy, President Trump honors veterans 75 years after D-Day
body:
On June 6, 1944, a coalition of 160,000 American soldiers and other Allied forces stormed the beaches of Normandy, France—a moment that foretold... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eceeb3c7e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 6, 2019
---
| | |
# **In Normandy, President Trump honors veterans 75 years after D-Day**

**On June 6, 1944** , a coalition of 160,000 American soldiers and other Allied forces stormed the beaches of Normandy, France—a moment that foretold the end of Nazi occupation in Europe and forever changed the course of history.

**President Donald J. Trump** spoke just yards from Omaha Beach at Normandy American Cemetery and Memorial this morning, paying tribute to the sacrifice these heroes made. “We are gathered here on Freedom’s Altar. On these shores, on these bluffs, on this day 75 years ago, 10,000 men shed their blood, and thousands sacrificed their lives, for their brothers, for their countries, and for the survival of liberty,” he said.

**“They came here** and saved freedom.”
**🎬** **Watch** : [“These men ran through the fires of hell,” President Trump says.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ec201aadf&e=3ee4985eea)
**This historic site** is now the resting place for 9,388 American service members who gave their lives for our freedom. More than 170 World War II veterans attended today’s ceremony, including more than 60 who landed as part of the D-Day operation. French President Emmanuel Macron and British Prime Minister Theresa May also spoke.

**Pausing during his address** , President Trump walked over and hugged one of the American veterans who joined him onstage. Private First Class Russell Pickett had been wounded in the first wave of soldiers that landed on Omaha Beach during D-Day. As he received treatment at a hospital in England, Private Pickett made it clear that his service wasn’t finished.

**“I’m going to return,”** Pickett said. Six days after D-Day, he rejoined his company. He would be gravely wounded twice more, including a third injury that caused him to lay unconscious for 12 days. He looked unlikely to survive.

**“And, today, believe it or not** , he has returned once more to these shores to be with his comrades,” President Trump said before embracing the 94-year-old veteran. “Private Pickett, you honor us all with your presence.”

**Before concluding,** President Trump gave a few lasting words of appreciation to the veterans of this Greatest Generation:

| _The men behind me will tell you that they are just the lucky ones. As one of them recently put it, “All the heroes are buried here.” But we know what these men did. We knew how brave they were. They came here and saved freedom, and then, they went home and showed us all what freedom is all about._

_The American sons and daughters who saw us to victory were no less extraordinary in peace. They built families. They built industries. They built a national culture that inspired the entire world. In the decades that followed, America defeated communism, secured civil rights, revolutionized science, launched a man to the Moon, and then kept on pushing to new frontiers. And, today, America is stronger than ever before._

_Seven decades ago, the warriors of D-Day fought a sinister enemy who spoke of a thousand-year empire. In defeating that evil, they left a legacy that will last not only for a thousand years, but for all time—for as long as the soul knows of duty and honor; for as long as freedom keeps its hold on the human heart._

_To the men who sit behind me, and to the boys who rest in the field before me, your example will never, ever grow old. Your legend will never tire. Your spirit—brave, unyielding, and true—will never die._

_. . . And our children, and their children, will forever and always be free._
|
[Read President Trump’s full speech to veterans at Normandy.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2eabbc26aa&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [Presidential Proclamation for the 75th Anniversary of D-Day](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=265a319bca&e=3ee4985eea)
|

name: Cory Booker
subject: What the new DNC threshold means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, When the DNC raised the donor threshold to make it onto the debate stage, I knew it was a direct challenge to an underdog campaign like ours. They're going to be taking their first look at our numbers in just 5 days, and we've got to make sure they're as strong as possible. [_**Can you chip in just $1 to help secure my spot in the debates?**_](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190606-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190606_CB_20190606-fr-CB-130k-actives_2020ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We haven't spent the last few years building up an online donor base and we're not taking money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. Running this campaign the right way matters deeply to me. But it's no surprise that means we're behind in the fundraising game. I want to be honest with you. The DNC is going to look at our donor numbers soon and make a judgment on how viable our campaign is -- and we're short of the 130,000 donor threshold they've set for future debates. To me, this is about a lot more than reaching a number. **Behind every single donation is a person who believes in us and what we 're building together enough to chip in to help. That action to own a piece of this campaign is truly powerful.** So I need your help. What we report to the DNC will decide whether I deserve a spot on the national stage. [_**If you think I should be in the debates, chip in right now to help guarantee our message is heard on the stage.**_](https://act.corybooker. clean_body: | | | | Friend, When the DNC raised the donor threshold to make it onto the debate stage, I knew it was a direct challenge to an underdog campaign like ours. They're going to be taking their first look at our numbers in just 5 days, and we've got to make sure they're as strong as possible. "=" We haven't spent the last few years building up an online donor base and we're not taking money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. Running this campaign the right way matters deeply to me. But it's no surprise that means we're behind in the fundraising game. I want to be honest with you. The DNC is going to look at our donor numbers soon and make a judgment on how viable our campaign is -- and we're short of the 130,000 donor threshold they've set for future debates. To me, this is about a lot more than reaching a number. Behind every single donation is a person who believes in us and what we 're building together enough to chip in to help. name: Draft Amy McGrath (via VPP)
subject: [petition enclosed] Sign if you're ready to take down Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | We'll keep it simple, Peter -- Senator Mitch McConnell has got to go. McConnell says, 'If I'm still the Majority Leader of the Senate, think of me as the Grim Reaper.' He said it himself: he's the Grim Reaper. Under his pathetic excuse for leadership, the Senate has become a graveyard where even uncontroversial legislation that the majority of Americans support goes to die. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We'll keep it simple, Peter -- Senator Mitch McConnell has got to go. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd6e/252737886/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1") He said it himself: he's the **Grim Reaper.** Under his pathetic excuse for leadership, the Senate has become a graveyard where even uncontroversial legislation that the _majority_ of Americans support goes to die. The Democratic House has passed over **140 bipartisan bills** \-- legislation that would take necessary action to protect Americans' health care, stop climate change, and enact common-sense gun safety reforms -- yet he continues to block all of these attempts to make progress. But luckily Democratic veteran Amy McGrath -- a strong progressive voice who has dedicated her life to serving this country -- is considering a run against McConnell. **YES!!** [**It 's way past time for a change in leadership. Sign our petition now if you think Amy McGrath should challenge Mitch McConnell in 2020!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd51/252737886/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+way+past+time+for+a+change+in+l&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1") | | | [Add your name](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd50/252737886/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1")
---
Despite running in 2018 as a first-time candidate in a heavily Republican district, Amy's opponent only won by the slimmest of margins.
Meanwhile, McConnell's approval rating from his own constituents is an abysmal 33 percent -- the **lowest** of all 100 senators.
At a time when the problems our nation faces only get bigger and more complicated each day, American families can't afford to have a Senate that stands still. We need ACTION. We need URGENCY. **We need Amy.**
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd53/252737886/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1")
[**Add your name today to let Amy know that you want to see leaders who are committed to serving the American people, not special interests!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd52/252737886/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name+today+to+let+Amy+know+that&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1")
| | [Sign now](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd55/252737886/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sign+now&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1")
---
We know Amy McGrath will put political dogma aside to **tackle the issues of today** and come to the table with **solutions** , not cowardice and obstructionism.
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d074a/72412298/42cc90b7/6101dd54/252737886/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190606_McGrath_U1_X1")
